original.description: SAP Platinum Partner mit SAP Activate-Zertifizierung: End-to-End-Hosting, Migration und Betrieb von S/4HANA auf Private Cloud, AWS und Azure — als RISE with SAP Premium Supplier mit 4.000+ SAP-Experten und 850.000 verwalteten SAP-Nutzern.

proposed.description: Hosts, migrates, and operates S/4HANA on FCI private cloud and hyperscalers using the MAX4SAP preconfigured process template with greenfield, brownfield, and SMARTField migration paths under SAP Activate methodology.

evidence.excerpt: MAX4SAP is a preconfigured template with nearly 40 E2E processes and 150+ modular processes. Customers can choose greenfield, brownfield, or SMARTField approaches.
T-Systems will offer RISE with SAP on their private cloud Future Cloud Infrastructure (FCI) as well as select hyperscalers.
MAX4SAP enables enterprises to spend up to 30% less time on Explore and Design stages. Modular design allows replicating small process steps or whole series of procedures.

notes: Replaced partnership credentials and headcount stats with actual mechanism: MAX4SAP template, FCI+hyperscaler hosting, and named migration approaches (greenfield/brownfield/SMARTField). SAP Activate methodology provides the framework context. Switched from German to English per portfolio.json language setting.
